description: REDEFINES across USAGE types: PIC X(3) base with COMP-3 overlay. Only base field accessed.
notes: IBM: REDEFINES lets COMP-3 overlay reinterpret DISPLAY bytes. Aletheia: REDEFINES overlay creates byte-backed region for base (CobolFieldProxy), but MOVE overwrites proxy with plain string. Overlay field name is mangled (ws_comp3redefinesws_disp) so direct access via WS-COMP3 causes NameError. GAP: REDEFINES overlay name resolution and cross-USAGE byte reinterpretation.
